top_findings.summary: The skill description includes "allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash(cmd:*)", which grants permission to execute any Bash command. This is excessive for a skill that primarily guides users through setting up Cursor for teams via web interfaces (e.g., cursor.com) and local configuration files. Such broad command execution access is unnecessary for reading/writing shared configuration files or providing instructional guidance, and it poses a security risk by potentially allowing unrelated system access or actions beyond the skill's stated purpose.
